audience: Executive leadership team and board observers
goal: Align leadership on Q1 performance, surface two operational risks, and secure approval for the H1 hiring plan.

extensions.document_title: Q1 2026 Business Review — Consolidated Results and Board Actions
extensions.one_sentence_thesis: Q1 exceeded revenue and margin targets, but two operational risks require immediate board action alongside the H1 hiring approval.
key_takeaways: Revenue hit $29.3M, beating plan by 4% and accelerating YoY growth to 18%
Gross margin expanded 210bps to 64.4% driven by infrastructure optimization
APAC pipeline grew 31% QoQ, now the fastest-growing segment
Supplier concentration risk requires dual-vendor plan by May 1
EMEA CAC rose 23% over two months with root cause unconfirmed
H1 hiring plan of 18 roles at $2.4M requires board ratification today
